title: Savory Creamy Indulgent British Beef Stir-fry
description: A savory and creamy dish featuring high-protein-friendly beef fillet in a rich sauce that is both indulgent and comforting.
instructions: Season the beef fillet with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic cloves and onion slices, sauté for about 3 minutes until softened.
Add beef fillet to the skillet, searing each side until browned and cooked through (approximately 5-7 minutes per side).
Remove beef from skillet and set aside. In the same skillet, add tomato sauce and Worcestershire sauce, whisk in heavy cream, and bring to a simmer.
Return the beef fillet to the skillet with the sauce mixture, gently stir until coated evenly with sauce, allowing it to warm through (about 5 minutes).
